Text: Very disappointing experience. I have faced missing items in my orders multiple times. Whenever I report the issue, the restaurant simply claims that everything was packed and sent. Instead of properly resolving the issue or refunding the missing items, I am often offered promo codes. What am I supposed to do with promo codes when I paid for items that were never delivered? Customers deserve fair resolutions, not compensation that forces them to place another order.

I am extremely disappointed with my recent Zomato order experience. I was initially unable to track the delivery partner. When I contacted him, he said he would arrive in 5 minutes, but shortly after, the order status was updated as "Delivered" even though I had not received the food.I contacted customer support and was connected to Azem, who said he would check with the delivery partner. A few minutes later, he simply stated that the order had been delivered and abruptly ended the chat.

Very bad experience. I ordered a combo meal from a major food chain, but some items were missing. There was no proper way to report the issue because Zomato only provided an AI chatbot. They refunded just ₹40 to my Zomato Wallet, even though the missing items were worth more, and the credit expired in one day. Instead of refunding my bank account, they kept the money in their wallet, which felt unfair and seemed to push me into placing another order just to use the credit.
L1_Category: Ease of Use & Digital Experience, Product & Service Quality

Text: Worst experience ever. The food was not delivered on the train despite the order being confirmed. This puts customers in a very confusing situation, as they keep waiting instead of ordering from other vendors. If the service cannot fulfill an order, it should not confirm it in the first place. Poor coordination, lack of communication, and a complete waste of time. Highly disappointed with the service and would not recommend it.

⭐ 1 Star Extremely disappointing experience. I waited over 90 minutes for my order, and the delivery time kept increasing. The delivery partner later informed me that another person had already taken my order and asked me to cancel it. No one could provide a clear update on where my order was. Offering a ₹50 coupon after wasting so much of a customer's time is unacceptable. Poor coordination, poor communication, and no respect for customers' time.
L1_Category: Ease of Use & Digital Experience, Fulfillment & Logistics, Value & Pricing
L2_Specific_Issue: App/Website Navigation, Promotions & Loyalty, Staff Professionalism

Text: The customer service is worse. They keep on misplacing food items (sending the wrong quantity, not delivering the ordered items etc...) and when I had a chat with the zomato support, it asked for all kinds of details & that was the end of it. No follow up, solutions, or refund, not even a proper apology. I tried mailing them, but they didn't even care to take proper measures to avoid the problem further nor did they give me a solution to my issue. All those extra fees for this kind of behavior?
L2_Specific_Issue: Agent Helpfulness, Refund & Policy Disputes, Staff Professionalism

Text: Ordered an item that is already made at the restaurant. It need to just pack and send. Delivery time displayed ~60 mins. I checked an hour later it still showed 45 mins and the order wasn't even picked up. Tried to cancel the order but the chatbot wouldn't cancel it without me forfeiting my money. It seems Zomato algo prioritize order batching above everything else even if it takes double the original time to deliver. Highly unethical practice.

Today on applying the order the expected delivery time is 23 minutes. Now its almost 55 minutes and still order has not been received. the zomato boat replies that I have to contact the restaurant. Restaurant is not picking up the call. Worst experience. Even zomato does not have customer service call. only boat. Also at every cash on delivery option I have to pay some amount online. It is ridiculous.

"I am very disappointed with Zomato's cancellation policy. I placed an order and paid ₹250, but within 2 minutes I needed to cancel it because of an unexpected situation at home. However, the app showed that I would not receive any refund at all. Customers can sometimes place orders by mistake or face sudden changes in plans. There should be a fair cancellation option, especially when the cancellation request is made immediately after placing the order. Losing the entire amount feels unfair 😡😡
L1_Category: Customer Support & Resolution, Ease of Use & Digital Experience

Text: Ordered 3 items but received only 1, despite paying the full amount. I made multiple attempts to contact the restaurant, but my calls were never answered. Zomato's chat support was also unable to resolve the issue. Customers should not have to chase restaurants and support teams for missing items after payment has been made. Very disappointing experience with both the restaurant and Zomato. If customer issues cannot be addressed properly, it reflects a serious gap in service
L1_Category: Customer Support & Resolution, Ease of Use & Digital Experience, Product & Service Quality
L2_Specific_Issue: Agent Helpfulness, Checkout & Payment Process, Order Accuracy (Missing/Wrong)

Text: The distance from my location to the restaurant is only 4.8 km on Google Maps, but Zomato shows it as 7.3 km and charges extra money for a longer distance. This is unfair and feels like a scam. Customers end up paying more than they should. It appears that the distance is being inflated to justify higher delivery fees. Customers should verify the actual distance before ordering.

Extremely disappointing experience. Zomato delivered an order with overcooked and Burnt food, and when I raised a complaint, instead of providing a refund they are just copy pasting that we acknowledged and we will not take any further action. Customers pay for food, not for overcooked food. The biggest issue is the lack of proper customer support. Recommend to use other platforms as they just want to earn money irrespective of the customer feedback.

Zomato "encourages" its users select orders cancelled by some other user, accepts payments, and then cancels these orders half an hour later. Don't fall for this gimmick. Also the customer care guys don't request or discuss it with you. Instead they direct you that your order is cancelled, refund initiated and you should place another order and wait for another 45 minutes for it to arrive. No requests, no apologies, not thanks, a simple assertion that you've been duped!

I paid online for my order but did not receive my parcel. After contacting support, I was connected to the delivery partner, who stated that he left my parcel on a public bench instead of delivering it to my address. I checked the location, but the parcel was not there. This is extremely frustrating and disappointing, especially since I have already paid for the order. This is not my fault. Please take immediate action, investigate this issue, and resolve it urgently.

This was not an order I placed myself. It was shown in the app as a cancelled order available to claim, so I claimed it. The delivery partner then called and said the order was not actually cancelled and asked me to cancel. I never received the food, yet my payment was retained as cancellation charges. Support said they would call back within 10–15 minutes, but I never received any call. Very disappointing experience.
L1_Category: Ease of Use & Digital Experience, Fulfillment & Logistics, Value & Pricing
L2_Specific_Issue: Checkout & Payment Process, Fees & Surcharges, Staff Professionalism

Text: This app has very poor customer support. I contacted them regarding missing items in my order, and instead of resolving the issue promptly, they asked me to email photos and other details and wait 24 hours. After following all their instructions, I was surprised to find that the issue remained unresolved and I was ultimately made to bear the cost of the missing items. The entire process was frustrating and showed a lack of accountability and concern for customers. Very unprofessional experience.
L1_Category: Customer Support & Resolution, Fulfillment & Logistics, Product & Service Quality
L2_Specific_Issue: Agent Helpfulness, Order Accuracy (Missing/Wrong), Staff Professionalism

Text: 1 question I have for a very long time is, even if the restaurant or anything don't open yet, why we still can't view yet and add to Cart what we want for later !!!?? we all don't have same schedule, time to scroll through all the menu listing, the only time we have, chose what we will like to order for later, just block from placing an order,not from viewing what we may like and allow to added them in our cart for later !!!!

I have experienced multiple incidents where my orders were either significantly delayed or not delivered at all. In the latest incident, the order was marked as "Delivered," but I never received or collected it. This has been happening repeatedly and is very disappointing. I request that you investigate these issues, provide a resolution for the missing order, and take steps to prevent such incidents in the future.

Pathetic experience. Prepaid for my order, never received it, and it was still marked as delivered. No call from the delivery partner, no proper support when I needed help, and chat support was useless. I had to send emails just to get a response. Despite not receiving my order, my refund was denied based only on system records. Lost both my food and money. Very disappointed with Zomato's service and customer support.I hope this issue is reviewed again and resolved fairly.
L2_Specific_Issue: Agent Helpfulness, Refund & Policy Disputes, Staff Professionalism

Text: I am disappointed with the overall customer support experience. The resolution process takes an excessively long time, often requiring 3–4 days of email communication before any meaningful action is taken. For online food delivery services, timely support is critical because food-related issues require immediate attention and cannot wait for several days to be resolved. Customers expect quick assistance when they encounter problems with their orders, such as missing items, incorrect orders
L1_Category: Customer Support & Resolution, Fulfillment & Logistics, Product & Service Quality
L2_Specific_Issue: Agent Helpfulness, Order Accuracy (Missing/Wrong), Speed of Delivery

Text: This app is getting worse day by day. They have literally become money launderers. The uprising platform fee wasn't enough for them, that they started altering their zomato gold policy. Now even with a gold membership, one cannot get free delivery too. I don't understand what is the point in getting a gold membership and using this app if they are not better than the rest. I think I'm nearing the end of using this app.
L2_Specific_Issue: Fees & Surcharges, Gold Hidden Fees/Platform Charges

Text: Massive price inflation and hidden charges. The restaurant menu price for this item is ₹70 if you collect it directly. However, Zomato has listed the base price as ₹140—literally double the cost! When you add the platform fee, delivery fee, packaging charges, and taxes, a simple meal becomes incredibly expensive. Disappointed with this lack of transparency and heavy markups.

I think zomato has a zero order cancellation policy. one day I was ordering some 2,3 food items from that I was trying to cancel 1 item and I was unable to do so . I tried support for this as soon as this order was placed, for whole 20 min they were just passing tym by saying we are unable to reach the restaurant or food is prepared or food is with delivery man but I reached support before food was started to prepare. I don't know how they keep customers and what type of service they provide.

I had received missing items in the order. The app isn't helpful for this issue and asks to drop an email. Even after following up 4times in 20 days, I have not received any response or acknowledgement from the team. There is no other way the app allows to contact the service center. The support is pathetic.

Not happy with the app experience. The only way to contact customer service is chat and that is not working. The app crashes and goes back to home page whenever I try opening chat. Edit: The app crash has stopped but it seems like they now have almost zero customer care to handle customer problems. It seems like they are using AI and all it does is give vague answers, and scare you with their 0 refund on cancellation(even for extreme delays)
L1_Category: Customer Support & Resolution, Ease of Use & Digital Experience
L2_Specific_Issue: Agent Helpfulness, App/Website Navigation, Refund & Policy Disputes

Text: Very disappointing experience with Zomato. I placed an order around 6:00 PM, but the delivery arrived only at 8:20 PM, which is an unacceptable delay. Due to this, I had to cancel the order as it was no longer useful. What made the situation worse was the response from customer support. Instead of resolving the issue, I was warned that my Cash on Delivery (COD) option might be deactivated or my account could be restricted. This felt unfair, especially when the delay was not from my side.

I placed an order on your platform and initially the estimated delivery time was shown as 25 minutes. However, after some time, I noticed on the map that the delivery partner had gone to a completely different location. I contacted your support team regarding this issue, and while they said they would check, the situation did not improve. Later, it showed that another delivery partner had taken the order, but even after waiting for more than 1 hour and 30 minutes, I still did not receive my ord

They take advance payment when ordering, then take the order but do not deliver it. They also took three hours and didn't even deliver it; they just canceled it late at night. The customer care number is invalid, and they don't listen to the problem. Ultimately, they cancel the order late at night. Finally, an agent calls, just says sorry, and talks rudely when we explain the problem. If we try to cancel it ourselves, it does not let us, and if canceled, it does not refund.

Text: It was good in the beginning, but now it feels like the focus is only on charging loyal customers more. When I contacted support, they asked for a photo of the missing product—which doesn’t make sense. Text: Even if you request for cancellation of order within a minute or two, the app tries it's best to not allow cancellation. Even if it does, it requires 100% payment as cancellation fee. 100% Payment for cancelling an item which was placed only a minute ago, all with the reason "The restaurant has put efforts to prepare the meal". What efforts? just accepting the order? If this goes on, I won't be surprised if other food delivery apps move ahead.

Text: I have been using the Zomato app for online food delivery and my experience so far has been good. However, over the past few days, I have been facing a glitch while applying coupons during checkout. Although the available coupons are visible, when I click on the “Apply” button, nothing happens and the total amount remains unchanged. This issue has been occurring consistently, making it difficult to avail offers.

I have taken the free delivery membership, and it has a 7 km limit. When I placed an order, it showed the restaurant distance as 7.7 km, but when I checked on another phone, the distance was 5.5 km. Zomato has become a very fake app now, and this is a very cheap thing done by them. If you are not able to provide free delivery, then why did you start this service? I would never recommend this app to anyone.

It was good in the beginning, but now it feels like the focus is only on charging loyal customers more. Text: 1 Star. Very disappointing experience. My order was never delivered, yet it was marked as delivered by the delivery partner. When I contacted customer support, instead of properly investigating the issue, they refused to provide a refund for an order I never received. It's been 3 days and I still have not received any response even after multiple reminders ! Pathetic customer service!!

Extremely disappointed with my experience on Zomato today. While placing an order, the app showed that the payment was unsuccessful, so I placed the order again. However, both orders were actually processed, the amount was debited for both. The worst part is that there is no option in the app to request a refund for the duplicate order that was caused by the payment error. Text: I am very impressed with Zomato. The app is easy to use and helps me find good restaurants quickly. The food delivery service is fast, reliable, and convenient. I like the restaurant ratings, reviews, and menu information, which make it easier to choose where to order from. The delivery partners are usually polite and orders arrive on time. Overall, Zomato provides an excellent food ordering experience, and I highly recommend it to anyone looking for quality food delivery and restaurant discover

Order was marked as delivered even though I never received any food. The delivery partner called once, nobody spoke, and then became unreachable despite multiple call attempts. Refund is not accountability or an explanation.

When I contacted customer support, I was simply told that since the order was showing as delivered in their system, nothing could be done. This response was completely unacceptable. As a cus

High price. Support staff is not good. They made me wait 24 hours for "missing item" in my order and still could not resolve it. Even after sharing proper screenshot of the food items, they could not resolve it. ZOMATO ! You are just scamming your users. I am uninstalling this app.

Text: If you have an issue, you can't speak to a human. You have to speak to a bot who will give you an unfair resolution. Text: Zomato is a very convenient app for ordering food and exploring restaurants. The interface is easy to use, and you can quickly browse menus, reviews, and ratings. Deliveries are usually on time, and there are many options to choose from. It’s great for discovering new places and ordering your favorite meals. Overall, a reliable app for food delivery and dining.

Text: Extremely disappointing and frustrating experience. I received a completely wrong order. On top of that, the delivery partner behaved very unprofessionally and asked me to scan through his personal number, which felt suspicious and unsafe. Since it was already around 1:00 AM, I had no option but to accept the order, but after checking, it was completely incorrect. I immediately reached out to support, but there was no proper response or resolution. This is highly irresponsible service .

Ordered from here recently. Food quality was decent but not exceptional-flavors were okay, nothing memorable. Portion size was fair for the price, though slightly on the expensive side for what you get. Delivery was on time and packaging was neat, no spills or issues there. However, the food wasn't hot enough when it arrived, which took away from the experience. Overall, it's an average place-good for a quick order if you're hungry, but not something I'd go out of my way to order again..........

There's no human, no callback, no real resolution flow. Just a maze designed to make people give up.

Text: Dear Zomato Support Team, I am writing to raise a complaint regarding my recent order which is showing as “Delivered” in the app, but I have not received the order. I checked the delivery location properly and also tried contacting the delivery partner, but the call could not be connected. Despite this, the order status was marked as delivered.

Positive 👍 Zomato is very convenient and user-friendly. The app has a wide variety of restaurants, detailed menus, and helpful customer reviews, making it easy to choose food. Delivery tracking is accurate, and offers/discounts are quite attractive. Negative 👎 Sometimes delivery gets delayed, especially during peak hours. Prices on the app can be higher compared to dining in, and customer support response can be slow in certain cases. thank you

Zomato habitually shows incorrect delivery timings. Recently it has happened twice where they showed 25 minutes and 45 minutes for 2 separate orders, but the actual delivery time was 52 minutes and 85 minutes respectively. And these orders weren't from extreme far off restaurants or a huge order which can be the cause for delays. There is no customer support to address this. If you order from zomato and there are any issues, you are on your own due to non existent customer support!

Very disappointing experience with this app. I had a really bad experience regarding order cancellation and refund. Even after cancelling my order, I did not receive my full refund in my original payment method. Instead, I was given a small coupon of just ₹29, which is completely unacceptable when my total amount was much higher. Also, the app shows misleading preparation times. It says food is prepared in 1 minute, which is clearly not true. This creates confusion and frustration for users.
L1_Category: Customer Support & Resolution, Ease of Use & Digital Experience, Fulfillment & Logistics, Value & Pricing
L2_Specific_Issue: Checkout & Payment Process, Promotions & Loyalty, Refund & Policy Disputes, Speed of Delivery

Text: I had a very bad experience with Zomato. Whenever an issue arises, it is not resolved properly. Their customer care service is extremely poor, and it is very difficult to contact them. In case of any problem, there is almost zero assistance, and customers are only asked to send an email. To make matters worse, even the emails often go unanswered.

Very disappointing experience. I paid the full amount, yet some food items were missing when the order arrived. It appears the delivery partner tampered with the package, which is completely unacceptable. When I contacted the restaurant, they said this has happened multiple times before, which is very concerning Customers expect their orders to be delivered properly and honestly. This kind of behavior breaks trust and ruins the experience. Strict action should be taken .

The delivery partner marks order delivered from his side but actually it will not deliver to you. Even the chat support is not responsive, it doesn't connect you with any executive nor resolve any issue. I tried many times, it only says to email them while the issue must be resolved instantly at that moment. Even email is also unresponsive.

i placed an orderd and when it came few items were missing, i reached out to an agent for support, was treated rudely and the issue was not solved. i reached out to another agent and they offered me less than what i had paid as a refund, then the refund never came i got no response, this is Theft. this was seriously one of tge worst experiences with an ordering app.
L1_Category: Customer Support & Resolution, Fulfillment & Logistics, Product & Service Quality
L2_Specific_Issue: Agent Helpfulness, Order Accuracy (Missing/Wrong), Refund & Policy Disputes, Staff Professionalism

Text: Too much content and UI is messy. Ordering food is not an easy task. Got confused and ordered wrong dish when I ordered the first time. And forced suggestions are very annoying. Miss the clean interface and awesome offers of Uber eats. Feb 2023 The service has become unusable. It usually takes 50 mins to get food from a restaurant 2 kms away. While other apps get it delivered within 20 mins. The cost of service with menu prices inflated and delivery fee means you will have to pay almost 1.7x

My orders are often grouped with others, which causes delays in delivery. By the time the food reaches me, it is usually stale and not fresh. More to add I placed an order for momos; however, the items delivered were incorrect. Despite reporting the issue promptly, I have neither received a satisfactory resolution nor been given an adequate opportunity to present my concern. This reflects extremely poor service and lack of accountability.

the support chatbot doesn't let you cancel the order until it is prepared and then it says it can't cancel the order now. the chatbot doesn't connect us to a supervisor even when explicitly told to do so several times. it takes 3 seperate conversations, half an hour and a call from the manager to cancel one order after the delivery guy is already at our doorstep. Absolute Horrid Customer support. PS: Has happened multiple times

I have been a Zomato member and customer for years, but support has become very disappointing. My order was placed at 8:30 PM with a promised delivery time of 25–35 minutes. The status remained stuck at "Delivery in 1 minute" for nearly 50 minutes. The delivery partner didn't answer calls and later marked the order as delivered even though I never received it. Support only asked me to email and later refused help. If Zomato charges platform and convenience fees, it should also take responsibilit
L1_Category: Ease of Use & Digital Experience, Fulfillment & Logistics

Text: Charging way more extra than the actual price, instead of the platform charges about 15/- (approx.) which was initially started in the disguise of 'Festive charges ' (something like that few years back). Most ironic and interesting part (for my case) - after taking Zomato gold there will be very very less number of coupons available with respect to those not having gold subscription, only 50/- off in most cases. Customer service is horrific unless you're comfortable in mailing them frequently.

Very poor delivery time management. The app shows 20–25 min at the time of ordering, but after the food is prepared, the delivery partner is often assigned multiple grouped deliveries, resulting in delivery after 1–1.5 hrs. A delay of 5–15 min is understandable, but not this. If the actual delivery time were shown upfront, customers could decide accordingly. Many people order during limited work breaks & depend on accurate timelines. And then they argue when customer wants to cancel the order.

Very disappointed with Zomato's handling of my order cancellation. I cancelled the order within about 5 minutes of placing it, yet I was charged the full order amount as a cancellation fee. Despite multiple emails, Zomato has failed to provide a satisfactory explanation or evidence that significant preparation had already been completed. Keeping the entire order value for a cancellation made almost immediately after ordering feels unfair and customer-unfriendly. What is most frustrating is the

The shitiest food ordering service out there. The customer support is useless, the app never gets updated, I feel cheated half of the time I order on the app. the customer support is never actually supportive, never accepts any issues with the quality of service or food.

I had an issue with a wrong item being delivered in my order. I contacted Zomato support and explained the problem. The team responded, reviewed my complaint, and processed the refund successfully. Thank you for resolving the issue and supporting your customers. Happy with the service and quick resolution.
L1_Category: Customer Support & Resolution, Fulfillment & Logistics, Product & Service Quality
L2_Specific_Issue: Order Accuracy (Missing/Wrong), Refund & Policy Disputes, Speed of Delivery

Text: pathetic and frustrating, I was forced to receive the delayed order as you guys didn't cancel and refund even after the order get delayed for an hour and you guys mentioned that I will be charged 100 percent cancellation fee, the ETA was 30 minutes and when I called the restaurant they were unable to find the order ID and when I reached to chat support they forcefully closed the chat and denied any help.
L1_Category: Customer Support & Resolution, Fulfillment & Logistics, Value & Pricing
L2_Specific_Issue: Agent Helpfulness, Fees & Surcharges, Refund & Policy Disputes, Speed of Delivery

Text: What a horrendous app with such poor delivery partners. My order was not fulfilled after delivery boy refused to deliver it, after fighting with me. He asked for the address (it was across the street from where he was standing) and wouldn't let me get a word in. Then he began arguing with me. Then he hung up and cancelled my order. I got no notification, I didn't get a refund either. Such a poor app. edit. I wrote to them and got no response after the 7th such instance I stopped using this ap
L2_Specific_Issue: Agent Helpfulness, Refund & Policy Disputes, Staff Professionalism

Text: It's very bad experience two times, 1. Delivery partner was not delivered the order due to bike was got maintenance. 2. Order received with missing item. In the both above cases no customer support provided. In the application there is system to raise complaint but these complaint are answer by AI system, due to same AI can not provide solutions to problems. So there should be customer support helpline number provided. Mistakes can happen with orders but no customer support provided.
L1_Category: Customer Support & Resolution, Fulfillment & Logistics, Product & Service Quality
L2_Specific_Issue: Agent Helpfulness, Order Accuracy (Missing/Wrong), Staff Professionalism

Text: it is helpful and gives excellent deals the food is not bad either. They even don't take service or handling charges it is excellent for senior citizens who can not afford to travel so much thr app does not even glitch and is very technically easy to use;it is user friendly we have given our first order and the food was excellent and warm They can just reduce the time the food takes to arrive

Very poor experience. They charged the full amount but delivered only part of the order. Instead of resolving the issue, they blamed the customer. Customer support was unhelpful and kept giving generic, robotic responses that felt AI-generated. Paying full price and receiving only half the product is unacceptable. Would not recommend.

Very poor service. My issue with order was not resolved they just said sorry for my wrong order adnhat too over mail after 10 days of my complaint. Sent me wrong order, haven't set any option for help except mail, and then on top of that just saying sorry when you receive wrong order. Pathetic. Very very disappointing. Never going to use this app. You guys too save yourself from getting scammed.

Perfectly trained app to misguide the customers or put the onus on the ones ordering for extreme delays, including threats like penalties for cancelling the orders once it's out for delivery despite extreme delays. the AI customer support will never redirect you to a call to resolve the problem while making you wait until the delivery is done and then close the chat successfully.

This platform is playing with the emotions of customers, the order was delivered short of item, the team did not taken action about the issue, horrible experience, If customer is raising an issue, it must be tackled seriously and a suitable answer or resolution must be given in positive way. you are simply dening to take any action. I have deleted my account with this application...never recommend to others, better to order directly to the restaurant..

You charged a higher price than what was shown on the menu, and on top of that, the wrong items were delivered. The customer support executives seem completely unhelpful. The restaurant is not answering Zomato's calls, and all your team can do is say "sorry" without providing any real solution. Even when the issue is clearly valid, no refund is offered. It feels like all you care about is taking customers' money, regardless of whether the restaurant delivers wrong or poor-quality items.
L1_Category: Customer Support & Resolution, Product & Service Quality
L2_Specific_Issue: Agent Helpfulness, Order Accuracy (Missing/Wrong), Refund & Policy Disputes

Text: such a bad app... no good customer service... Very disappointing experience with this food delivery app. The order arrived much later than the promised time, and the food was cold and poorly packed. Customer support was unhelpful and took too long to respond. Despite paying delivery charges, the overall service was far below expectations. I hope they improve their delivery efficiency and customer service.
L1_Category: Customer Support & Resolution, Fulfillment & Logistics, Value & Pricing

Text: This is my favorite app among all similar apps. The service is fast and I often get useful coupons and discounts on my orders. The delivery staff are polite, disciplined and professional. Overall, it's a reliable app with great service and excellent customer experience. Highly recommended!!!

I have ordered food from meat and eat on 2 combo packs and 1 grilled chicken(4 pcs), however only partial items( 1 burger, 1 grilled chicken and 1 fries) was delivered. we raised complaint immediately via ZOMATO APP but it redirected us to send the complaint to there email ID and same was done with all evidence. After many followup, till not there is no response from zomato side for the refund. poor customer service and completely doing fraud activities.

the delivery is always late . there's no refund option if I want to cancel the delivery and get it by myself. it's been one hour since I have ordered but still it's showing that the capital is on time . such a dead app. there is no proper support system as well . I hate this delay almost every single time. if you cannot provide delivery on time then just don't promise that you will.
L2_Specific_Issue: Refund & Policy Disputes, Speed of Delivery

Text: Very disappointing experience. I ordered a Full Biryani from Nandanam Restaurant ( electronicCity through Zomato, but received a much smaller quantity than advertised. The food quantity was far below expectations, and the issue was not resolved satisfactorily. Customers rely on the information shown in the app, and such misleading listings should be monitored more strictly. Zomato needs to ensure restaurants provide the quantity they advertise and improve customer support for such complaints.

It's not always good when a restaurant forges ahead and doesn't refund the payment. This has happened to me many times in the past. Just order and you're lucky if you get some good food at home. Otherwise, consider your money wasted. Zomato only cares about its commission and not the customer's happiness. Many customers are losing money. No one listens.
L1_Category: Customer Support & Resolution, Ease of Use & Digital Experience
L2_Specific_Issue: Checkout & Payment Process, Refund & Policy Disputes

Text: Surprisingly they have no customer care ,couple of times I didn't receive my order and in the app it's showed order delivered and I lost my money, when I raised complaint on the app it said to email them, I emailed them multiple times and they never reply. Swiggy's customer care is 10 times better.

The worst app I have ever seen. Barely taking any responsibility of the orders and related issues. The restaurants cancel the order after making it approved. further the money deducted will never refund however it shows as refunded in the app. Being a widely used app please improve your customer support system and work on the services what you actually promise in the promos and ads.

⭐ 1 Star: Congratulations on turning a simple food delivery into a 2-hour waiting game. Ordered at 9 PM, and by 11 PM the food still wasn't in my hands. Complete waste of time and a very frustrating experience. If you can't deliver on time, don't promise unrealistic delivery estimates. Lost a customer today.
